---
title: "Configuration Guide"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Configuration Guide}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Configuration Guide

The `_starlightr.toml` file controls how your documentation site is built and organized.
Run `use_starlightr()` to generate a starter config.

## Site Metadata

```toml
[site]
title = "My Package"
description = "Documentation for my R package"
```

## Navbar

Add icons/links to the top navigation bar:

```toml
[navbar]
right = [{ icon = "github", href = "https://github.com/user/repo" }]
```

## Sidebar

Organize articles and reference pages into labeled groups:

```toml
[sidebar]
articles = [
  { label = "Getting Started", contents = [
    { slug = "README", label = "Welcome" },
    "introduction",
    "configuration",
  ] },
]

reference = [
  { label = "Core Functions", contents = [
    "build_site",
    "use_starlightr",
  ] },
  { label = "Helpers", contents = [
    "add_action",
    "add_card",
  ] },
]
```

Article slugs map to vignette filenames (without `.Rmd`). The special slug
`"README"` maps to the package's `README.Rmd` or `README.md`.

Reference entries map to Rd topic names. Glob patterns like `"process_*"` are
supported.

## Home Page

Configure the landing page hero section and feature cards:

```toml
[home]
hero = { tagline = "Documentation for my package", actions = [
  { text = "Get Started", link = "./articles/readme/", icon = "right-arrow", variant = "primary" },
  { text = "GitHub", link = "https://github.com/user/repo", icon = "external", variant = "minimal" },
] }
cards = [
  { icon = "document", title = "Quickstart", description = "Get up and running", link = "./articles/readme/" },
]
```

## Reference Processing

Control which sections appear in reference pages:

```toml
[reference]
skip_sections = ["name"]
include_pagefind = true
```

## Theme

```toml
[theme]
color_mode = "auto"  # "light", "dark", or "auto"
```

## Features

```toml
[features]
katex = true  # Enable math rendering (default: true)
```

## Output

```toml
[output]
dir = "../my-docs-site"
include_build_files = true  # Generate package.json, .gitignore, remark plugin
```

## Versioned Documentation

Enable multi-version documentation with tagged releases:

```toml
[versions]
enabled = true
list = [
  { tag = "0.2.0", label = "v0.2.0", default = true },
  { tag = "0.1.0", label = "v0.1.0" },
]
```

When enabled, a version selector component is added to the site header and a
GitHub Actions workflow is generated for building all tagged versions.
